balanced.description: A balanced default mode with readable composition, grounded realism, and clear visual hierarchy.

messy_ordered_real.description: Stronger subject emphasis, more ordered chaos, more realistic materials and less poster-like stylization.

single_subject_poetic.description: Cleaner compositions for single-subject images with poetic light, emotional focus, and realistic photographic texture.

experimental_floral_motion.description: Experimental floral imagery with rotational blur, vortex-like motion, layered petals, and dreamlike but still photographic texture.

graphic_documentary_silhouette.description: High-contrast documentary-style silhouettes with strong geometry, hard backlight, and rhythmic figure placement.
